name: Expectation Management
description: Sets, communicates, and maintains realistic expectations with clients and stakeholders to prevent misunderstandings, build trust, and ensure successful campaign outcomes.

variables.name: stakeholder
variables.description: Who has the expectation: client, manager, stakeholder

variables.name: current_expectation
variables.description: What the stakeholder currently expects: timeline, budget, performance

variables.name: reality_constraints
variables.description: What is realistic given constraints: data, budget, timeline, market conditions

variables.name: communication_context
variables.description: Context for the conversation: initial project setup, mid-project update, post-mortem

inputs.name: stakeholder
inputs.description: Who has the expectation: client, manager, stakeholder

inputs.name: current_expectation
inputs.description: What the stakeholder currently expects: timeline, budget, performance

inputs.name: reality_constraints
inputs.description: What is realistic given constraints: data, budget, timeline, market conditions

inputs.name: communication_context
inputs.description: Context for the conversation: initial project setup, mid-project update, post-mortem
